full_name: Steel, Bars, Forgings, and Tubing, 3.2Ni-1.2Cr-0.12Mo (0.07-0.13C) (AISI 9310), Carburizing Grade (UNS G93106)
version_year: see SAE catalog for current revision
scope: Covers aircraft-quality AISI 9310 chromium-nickel-molybdenum carburizing steel (UNS G93106) in bars, forgings, mechanical tubing, and forging stock. Low nominal carbon (~0.10%) provides a tough core while carburizing produces a hard, wear-resistant, high-fatigue case. Used for aircraft gears, shafts, and bearing components.

mechanical_properties.note: Carburizing steel; core mechanical properties depend on heat treatment. Typical heat-treated core values below.

license_note: Composition (UNS G93106) and typical core properties compiled from freely published mill/distributor datasheets citing AMS 6260 / AISI 9310; no paywalled SAE text reproduced.
